name: Fish-Net
description: Open-source Unity multiplayer networking solution built for performance. Offers client-hosted and dedicated server support with prediction, lag compensation, and observer patterns.

seo.title: Fish-Net — Game Development Tools
seo.meta_description: Fish-Net: Open-source Unity multiplayer networking solution built for performance. Offers client-hosted and dedicated server support with prediction, lag compen

when_to_use: Client-hosted multiplayer Unity game with lag compensation
Prediction-based movement for fast-paced competitive game
Observer pattern for spectator mode in an online title
Dedicated server deployment for a Unity battle-arena game
Free alternative to Mirror for a production Unity multiplayer title

pros: Free Pro tier via Patreon unlocks advanced features
Built-in client prediction and lag compensation
Active Discord with responsive lead developer
Outperforms Mirror in stress tests on most scenarios
cons: Documentation is improving but still incomplete
Steeper learning curve than Mirror for newcomers
Rapid version changes can break existing projects
review.verdict: The strongest free Unity networking stack in 2025 if you can tolerate sparse docs and a fast-moving API.
review.best_for: Unity teams shipping competitive or physics-heavy multiplayer with prediction
review.not_for: Non-Unity engines or teams needing enterprise-grade commercial support

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
